etymology.description: 木(木) (mù, "tree") + 考(考) (kǎo, "examine") = analyze wood -> distinction between aged trees
etymology.interpretation: The character 㯥(cáo, "analyze") combines 木(木) (mù, "tree") to signify something related to trees with 考(考) (kǎo, "examine") to convey the idea of closely analyzing the condition of wood. It suggests a thought process of scrutinizing or caring for trees or wooden materials, typically distinguishing aged or examined wood.
